mapper.select: SELECT a.user_id, a.uid, a.user_name, a.headimgurl FROM (SELECT u.user_id, a.user_id AS uid, ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by a.user_id) AS top, u.user_name, u.headimgurl FROM lkt_living_audience a LEFT JOIN lkt_user u ON a.user_id = u.user_id WHERE a.living_id = #{roomId} AND a.recycle = 0 -- a.sc = 0-- AND a.end_time IS NULL ORDER BY a.add_time ASC) AS a WHERE a.top = 1

SELECT a.uid, a.user_id, a.user_name, a.headimgurl, a.mobile, a.add_time, a.store_id, a.living_id, a.recycle, a.startTime, a.sc FROM ( SELECT a.user_id AS uid, u.user_id, u.user_name, u.headimgurl, u.mobile, a.add_time, a.store_id, a.living_id, a.recycle, min( date_format( a.start_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s' )) over(partition by a.user_id) AS startTime, sum( a.sc ) over(partition by a.user_id) AS sc, ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by a.user_id) as top FROM lkt_living_audience a LEFT JOIN lkt_user u ON a.user_id = u.user_id and a.store_id = #{store_id} and a.living_id = #{roomId} and a.recycle=0 and (a.user_id=#{keyWord} or a.user_name like concat ('%',#{keyWord},'%') or a.mobile =#{keyWord})
and a.add_time >= #{start_time} and a.add_time <= #{end_time} order by a.add_time asc ) AS a where a.top <2 limit #{pageNo},#{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM lkt_living_audience a LEFT JOIN lkt_user u ON a.user_id = u.user_id
group by a.user_id
